story.title: ตำนานประตูแห่งชะตากรรม
story.position: นักรบผู้ค้นหาความจริงในอดีต
story.goal: ค้นหาความจริงเกี่ยวกับพลังที่ซ่อนอยู่ในตัวเขา

basic_information.origin: อาณาจักรโบราณตะวันออก

face.description: ใบหน้าคม สุขุม ดวงตาลึก มีแววเด็ดเดี่ยว

hair.style: ผมยาวสีดำ มัดครึ่งศีรษะ

eyes.expression: สงบนิ่งแต่มีความลับซ่อนอยู่
eyes.blink_rate: dynamic (12-18 blinks per minute, increases when nervous or thinking)
eyes.gaze_style: focused, steady, with natural saccadic eye movements
eyes.detail: intense iris texture, subtle moisture reflection, realistic pupil dilation based on lighting and emotion
eyes.eye_contact: maintains steady contact but naturally breaks to look at objects of interest
eyes.micro_movements: subtle jitter, tracking moving objects smoothly

micro_expressions: subtle nostril flare during intense breathing
facial_dynamics.skin_texture: realistic skin pores, subtle sweat in intense scenes, realistic subsurface scattering for skin
facial_dynamics.natural_movements: subtle head tilts, natural jaw relaxation, slight neck muscle tension during speech
facial_dynamics.blinking_behavior: natural asynchronous blinking, partial blinks during deep thought

speech_dynamics.lip_sync_precision: ultra-high, specialized for Thai tonal phonetics

thai_articulation.vowels: precise mouth opening for Thai long/short vowels (a, ee, oo, uo)
thai_articulation.consonants: accurate labial and dental placement for Thai sounds (p, b, m, f, th)
thai_articulation.tone_influence: subtle facial muscle tension changes based on Thai tones (high, low, falling, rising)

speech_dynamics.jaw_movement: natural vertical and lateral displacement based on vowel intensity and Thai tonal inflections
speech_dynamics.tongue_visibility: subtle visibility during open vowels (a, e, o) and specific Thai dental consonants

emotional_sync.anger: wide, aggressive mouth movements, increased jaw tension
emotional_sync.sadness: subtle, quivering lip movements, downward mouth corners
emotional_sync.joy: upward mouth corners, relaxed jaw, crinkling at the eyes
emotional_sync.determined: firm, precise mouth movements, slight chin thrust

speech_dynamics.secondary_motion: cheeks, nasolabial folds, and chin muscles react dynamically to Thai phoneme changes

body.build: รูปร่างนักรบ แข็งแรง

posture.idle_behavior: subtle weight shifting, natural breathing-driven chest movement
posture.shoulder_dynamics: relaxed but firm, slight movement during speech

hand_gestures.finger_detail: natural finger curling, subtle twitching when tense
hand_gestures.speech_gestures: uses hands to emphasize key points, open palms for honesty, closed fists for determination
hand_gestures.interaction: smooth transitions between holding weapons and gesturing

environmental_interaction.lighting_response: subtle squinting in bright light, skin glows under moonlight, realistic shadows on face
environmental_interaction.weather_response: hair and clothing react naturally to wind, subtle shivering in cold, moisture on skin in rain
environmental_interaction.physics_interaction: clothing folds react to movement, feet plant firmly on uneven terrain, hands interact realistically with props
environmental_interaction.spatial_awareness: looks towards sound sources or points of interest in the environment

costume.main_outfit: ชุดนักรบโบราณสีดำ
costume.material: ผ้าผสมหนัง
accessories: จี้หยกโบราณ

strengths: วิเคราะห์สถานการณ์เก่ง
ปกป้องคนอื่น
weaknesses: ไม่ไว้ใจผู้อื่นง่าย
แบกรับอดีตของตัวเอง

voice.tone: deep, calm, heroic, with rich resonance
vocal_traits: clear Thai articulation with natural tonal inflections
subtle vocal fry in low registers
realistic aspiration on aspirated consonants (ph, th, kh)

advanced_settings.vocal_texture: smooth with slight graininess in emotional moments
advanced_settings.breathing_pattern: natural pauses for breath every 2-3 phrases, audible intake during intense scenes
advanced_settings.intonation_style: melodic Thai prosody, emphasizing key emotional words

visual_prompt.positive: young eastern warrior, long black hair, ancient black warrior outfit, calm expression, cinematic fantasy style
